question: The research project concludes in Phase 3. Which of the following is true?

options.A: Chicago will be selected as the store location.
options.B: Los Angeles will be selected as the store location.
options.D: New York will be selected as the store location.

explanation: While Chicago currently has the highest preference (56.1%), the chart shows results as of Phase 1, but the research project concludes in Phase 3. The remaining research period could dramatically change the outcome, making it premature to predict a winner. The concealed uncertainty lies in the incomplete research project that is not reflected in the chart.
